question: Based on the line chart of annual profit, what can be concluded about the trend over the years shown?

options.A: Profit increased each year, but the exact profit in the final year cannot be determined from the chart.
options.B: Profit was highest in the first year.
options.C: Profit in the last two years is the same.
options.D: Profit fell steadily over the period.

explanation: Bars for the highest years exceed the canvas and are clipped, making them look the same height; the true relationship cannot be inferred from the visual.
